# Vertiv

**Category:** Modular / Prefabricated, Cooling, Power Infrastructure  
**Website:** https://www.vertiv.com/

## Headline
Strong fit for buyers focused on AI-era power and thermal challenges.

## Overview
Vertiv sits close to the center of the AI infrastructure conversation because of its strong association with thermal management, power systems, and data center support infrastructure. For modular and AI-ready deployments, it is especially relevant where cooling and density constraints are central to the buying decision.

## Key capabilities
- cooling infrastructure
- modular data center support systems
- power and backup infrastructure

## Best fit for
- high-density compute environments
- AI infrastructure planning
- buyers prioritizing thermal and electrical constraints

## Considerations
Good candidate for cooling-heavy comparisons and category pages, especially where liquid or advanced thermal planning is part of the discussion.
